description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern, modular design with a combination of horizontal wood slat drawers and cabinets, a black countertop, and integrated appliances. On the left, a tall pantry cabinet with multiple shelves is visible, while the central section includes a cooktop and a series of drawers and cabinets below. Above the countertop, wall-mounted cabinets with matching wood slat fronts provide additional storage. To the right, a washing machine is built into a dedicated alcove, separated by a partial wall. The cabinetry is framed by white side and back panels, giving it a clean, built-in appearance. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on functionality and visual contrast between the wood, black surfaces, and white framing.
description: A modern modular cabinetry set with wood slat drawers, black countertop, wall cabinets, and integrated appliances, framed by white panels. Features a tall pantry, central cooking area, and a washing machine alcove.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry layout, including the tall pantry, central drawers, wall cabinets, black countertop, and washing machine alcove.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry, the partial wall enclosing the washing machine, and the layered arrangement of the cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain white back panel, with no cabinetry details or hardware visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the thickness of the cabinetry and the separation between the main cabinets and the washing machine alcove.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of drawers, double doors, and open shelf
